message:
test(conformance): differential harness for wchar.h core vs glibc

CONFORMANCE: libc wchar.h diff matrix.

10 functions covered, 11 tests:
- wcslen (5 inputs incl. high bytes + supplementary planes)
- wcscmp / wcsncmp (10 pairs × 4 bounds, sign-of-result compare)
- wcschr / wcsrchr (7-5 chars over an [a,b,c,a,b,c,NUL] string)
- wcsstr (6 (haystack, needle) cases)
- wcscpy / wcsncpy (4 sources × 4 bounds, post-call buffer compare)
- mbstowcs / wcstombs ASCII round-trip (4 inputs)

Reference functions declared via extern blocks since libc crate
doesn't re-export wcs* / mb-conversions. Comparator handles libc::wchar_t
(i32 on Linux) ↔ frankenlibc's *const u32 via Vec<u32> conversion.

0 divergences observed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
